title: urginea maritima var. maura
intro: Urginea maritima var. maura, also known as autumn squill or sea squill, is a plant species that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparation of Urginea maritima var. maura typically involves drying the bulb and using it to make teas, tinctures, or capsules, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
